name: 诗歌分析
subject: english
domain_name: 读者-作者-文本 / Readers, Writers, Texts / Readers, Writers, Texts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to analyse the relationship between form (e.g., sonnet, free verse, stanzaic structure) and content in a poem, explaining how poetic techniques (meter, rhyme, enjambment) contribute to its meaning and effect.
Students will be able to interpret complex imagery, metaphor, and symbolism in poetry, situating their analysis within the poem's broader thematic and emotional landscape.

interactive_resources.note: 制作课件时在 search_url 搜索对应练习，获取 embed 代码嵌入
